name: FitPulse
description: AI-Powered Fitness Buddy — personalized workout plans, nutrition guidance, BMI/BMR calculator, habit tracker, and 24/7 AI coaching powered by IBM watsonx.ai Granite models.

SECRET_KEY.description: A long random string used to sign Flask sessions. Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

FLASK_ENV.description: Flask environment. Use 'production' for live deployments.

FLASK_DEBUG.description: Enable Flask debug mode. Must be 0 in production.

DATABASE_URL.description: SQLAlchemy database connection string. Defaults to SQLite for local use.

WATSONX_API_KEY.description: IBM Cloud IAM API Key. Get it from https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys — format: ApiKey-xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx

WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.description: IBM watsonx.ai Project ID. Found under your project's Manage tab at https://dataplatform.cloud.ibm.com

WATSONX_URL.description: IBM watsonx.ai regional endpoint. Format: https://<region>.ml.cloud.ibm.com (no trailing slash). Common values: https://us-south.ml.cloud.ibm.com, https://eu-de.ml.cloud.ibm.com, https://au-syd.ml.cloud.ibm.com

WATSONX_MODEL_ID.description: IBM Granite or LLaMA model ID to use for chat. Must support the /text/chat endpoint. Confirmed working: meta-llama/llama-3-3-70b-instruct

MAX_CHAT_HISTORY.description: Maximum number of past chat messages sent to the AI model per request.

PORT.description: Port the gunicorn server listens on. Set automatically by most platforms.
